name: Wandering Fairy in the Castle of Dreams
desc:
2+ monsters, including a "Castle of Dreams" Spellcaster monster
Unaffected by Spell/Trap effects, except "Castle of Dreams" Spell/Traps.
Once per Chain, if a monster(s) is Special Summoned from your opponent's Deck and/or Extra Deck (Quick Effect): Apply 1 of these effects (your opponent's choice);
● Both players can return any number of cards in their hand to the Deck, then you draw until you have 6 cards and your opponent draws until they have 3 cards.
● Both players Special Summon 1 monster from their GY/banishment, but negate the effects of that opponent monster.
● Both players Set 1 Spell/Trap from their Deck/GY or banishment. The Spell/Trap you Set can be activated this turn, but the Spell/Trap your opponent Set cannot be activated this turn.
If this card is in your GY (Quick Effect): You can target 1 card on the field or in the GY; return this card and that target to the hand. You can only use this effect of "Wandering Fairy in the Castle of Dreams" once per turn.
strings: Choose effect: Both players return hand to Deck and draw
Choose effect: Both players Special Summon 1 monster
Choose effect: Both players Set 1 Spell/Trap
Return this card and target to hand
